creator: yom@iaelu.net
text:
I currently do not have any packages related to grpc which could lock:

root@fractal:~ # pkg unlock -a
7-zip-24.08: already unlocked
root@fractal:~ # pkg info -d 7-zip
7-zip-24.08:
        libsysinfo-0.0.3_3
root@fractal:~ # pkg info -d libsysinfo
libsysinfo-0.0.3_3:
root@fractal:~ #

I had a custom repo with defaults options (which should not break compat) to compile wine and wine-proton so version is sync'ed on both package, but that was 3 months ago and I've deactivated it a week after.

My method to upgrade packages is:
pkg update
pkg upgrade
pkg autoremove

I'm sometime forcing install with pkg install -f, but not on a regular base.
